title: event.birthdateRange.put
description: Describes the request body to set the birthdate range for the attendees of the [event](./models/event.json).

from.description: The earliest birthdate in the range, as an ISO-8601 date. For example `2021-01-31`.

to.description: The latest birthdate in the range, as an ISO-8601 date. For example `2021-12-31`.
